name: Turkey Tacos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine turkey scallops with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
2. Heat the grill or dry cast iron pan over high heat until smoking.
3. Sear the turkey slices about half a minute per side.
4. Transfer the seared turkey to a cutting board and chop into 1/2 inch strips.
5. Reserve the chopped turkey with juices in the bowl.
6. Toast the corn tortillas.
7. For each serving, place two tortillas on a plate.
8. Spread refried black beans on the tortillas.
9. Top with seared turkey strips, one tablespoon of red salsa, and pickled shallots.
10. Add avocado slices.
11. Roll up the tacos and serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings
Note: This recipe is designed for quick preparation using common ingredients found in the pantry. Leftovers can be used instead, such as pink beans or additional pickled vegetables.
